probes.documented_seam: Hermes top-level -z/--oneshot mode in hermes_cli/main.py and hermes_cli/oneshot.py
probes.expected_result: Wrapper launches pinned Hermes with a minimal environment and receives a redacted final response preview
probes.negative_probe: Wrapper rejects forbidden env keys, credential-like env values, and credential-like argv values before spawning Hermes

probes.documented_seam: Hermes MCP bridge tools events_wait, permissions_list_open, and permissions_respond in mcp_serve.py
probes.expected_result: Approval request is observed, responded to, and the same Hermes run continues without cross-thread leakage
probes.negative_probe: Wrong actor, stale request, replayed approval, and mutated decision are denied

probes.documented_seam: Telclaude-served Hermes MCP relay-only HTTP endpoint
probes.expected_result: HTTP JSON-RPC client proves positive tools-only control and specific adversarial denials
probes.negative_probe: Forged handle, wrong connection, cross-domain memory, out-of-scope provider/outbound, sampling, malformed, unauthenticated, batch, prototype-key, and execute-without-ledger calls fail closed

probes.documented_seam: Hermes model provider and endpoint configuration is generated by the wrapper and mounted read-only
probes.expected_result: Model traffic reaches only the Telclaude relay endpoint and direct non-relay model-provider egress fails
probes.negative_probe: A planted model-provider plugin or writable profile override cannot bypass the relay route
